\u2014 Day 27: Yield Farming Platform","details":"THE DeFi LIQUIDITY BOOTSTRAPPING LOOP         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  1. Protocol needs liquidity to function.                    \u2502         \u2502  2. Users won't deposit without incentive.                   \u2502         \u2502  3. Solution: reward stakers with a governance/reward token. \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  Real-world parallels:                                       \u2502         \u2502  \u2022 Uniswap V2  \u2192 stake LP tokens, earn UNI                  \u2502         \u2502  \u2022 Compound    \u2192 supply assets, earn COMP                    \u2502         \u2502  \u2022 Aave        \u2192 deposit collateral, earn AAVE               \u2502         \u2502  \u2022 Misty Farm  \u2192 stake $WATERS LP, earn reward tokens        \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         TIME-BASED REWARD FORMULA (per-second accrual)         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  elapsed   = block.timestamp \u2212 stakeTimestamp[user]          \u2502         \u2502  reward    = stakedBalance \u00d7 rewardRatePerSecond \u00d7 elapsed   \u2502         \u2502              / PRECISION                                     \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  Example (rate = 0.01 token/sec/token staked):              \u2502         \u2502    User stakes 100 tokens for 1 day (86,400 s)              \u2502         \u2502    reward = 100e18 \u00d7 0.01e18 \u00d7 86400 / 1e18                 \u2502         \u2502           = 86,400 tokens                                    \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         BOOSTED REWARDS (lock-duration multiplier)         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  Flexible (no lock)  \u2192 1.0\u00d7 base reward                     \u2502         \u2502  \u2265 30 days lock      \u2192 1.25\u00d7 boosted reward                 \u2502         \u2502  \u2265 180 days lock     \u2192 1.5\u00d7  boosted reward                 \u2502         \u2502  \u2265 365 days lock     \u2192 2.0\u00d7  boosted reward                 \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  Inspired by Curve Finance's veCRV: longer lock = better    \u2502         \u2502  yield to align long-term holders with the protocol.        \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         EMERGENCY WITHDRAW         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  Instant exit with NO reward claim.                          \u2502         \u2502  Pending rewards are forfeited \u2014 returned to reward pool.    \u2502         \u2502  Useful if user needs liquidity urgently or lock has not    \u2502         \u2502  expired yet.  Protects the protocol from reward drain.     \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         SECURITY         \u2022 ReentrancyGuard on stake/unstake/claim/emergency paths.         \u2022 SafeERC20 for all token transfers.         \u2022 pendingRewards snapshot on stake to avoid retroactive accrual.         \u2022 Lock enforcement: cannot unstake before lockEndTime.         \u2022 Reward solvency check: claimRewards reverts if pool is dry.         USE CASES IN MISTYCOIN-CORE         \u2022 Stake MistySwap LP tokens (Day 25) to earn $WATERS rewards.         \u2022 Stake $WATERS directly to earn governance tokens.         \u2022 Treasury (Day 24 MultiSig) deposits reward tokens as incentive.","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"calculateAPY()":{"details":"APY FORMULA:         yearlyEmission = rewardRatePerSecond \u00d7 365 days \u00d7 totalStaked                         / PRECISION         APY (%) = yearlyEmission \u00d7 100 / totalStaked                 = rewardRatePerSecond \u00d7 365 days \u00d7 100 / PRECISION         This cancels totalStaked, so APY is independent of pool size         (true for per-token-per-second reward rates).  In practice,         as totalStaked grows, the effective APY per token stays         constant \u2014 the protocol emits MORE tokens total but each         staker's share is proportional.","returns":{"apy":" Percentage APY (e.g. 10 = 10 %)."}},"calculateReward(address)":{"params":{"user":"Staker address."},"returns":{"totalReward":" Claimable reward amount (in reward token decimals)."}},"checkRewardSolvency(uint256)":{"params":{"windowSeconds":"Lookahead period (e.g. 7 days = 604_800)."},"returns":{"solvent":"      True if pool balance covers projected emissions."}},"claimRewards()":{"details":"REWARD CALCULATION ORDER:         1. base accrual since last stake/claim = _calculateBaseReward()         2. add frozen pendingRewards (from previous re-stakes)         3. apply boost multiplier for lock duration         4. reset pendingRewards and stakeTimestamp         SOLVENCY CHECK: reverts if the contract cannot pay the full         reward.  Owner must fund the reward pool proactively using         fundRewards()."},"constructor":{"params":{"_owner":"Owner \u2014 can update rate and fund rewards.","_rewardRatePerSecond":"Initial emission rate (scaled \u00d7 PRECISION).                             Set to 1e16 for ~0.01 token/sec/token staked.","_rewardToken":"ERC-20 users earn   (e.g. $WATERS).","_stakingToken":"ERC-20 users deposit (e.g. MSLP from Day 25 AMM)."}},"emergencyWithdraw()":{"details":"Use case: user needs liquidity urgently, or lock hasn't expired.         Forfeited rewards stay in the contract, growing the reward pool         for other stakers \u2014 a healthy incentive against panic exits.         NOTE: bypasses the lock check intentionally.         This is the \"break glass\" mechanism \u2014 always available."},"fundRewards(uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Reward tokens to add to the pool."}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"setRewardRate(uint256)":{"params":{"newRate":"New rewardRatePerSecond (scaled \u00d7 PRECISION)."}},"stake(uint256,uint256)":{"details":"RE-STAKE LOGIC \u2014 if the user already has a position:         1. Snapshot their existing earned rewards into pendingRewards.         2. Add new tokens to stakedBalance.         3. Reset stakeTimestamp to now (fresh accrual window).         This preserves all previous earnings while avoiding double-         counting: the old balance's rewards up to now are frozen in         pendingRewards; only future accrual uses the new total balance.         LOCK DURATION \u2014 users choose flexibility or commitment:         \u2022 0          \u2192 no lock, 1.0\u00d7 rewards, unstake anytime         \u2022 30 days    \u2192 soft lock, 1.25\u00d7 boost         \u2022 180 days   \u2192 medium lock, 1.5\u00d7 boost         \u2022 365 days   \u2192 full-year lock, 2.0\u00d7 boost (Curve veCRV-style)","params":{"_lockSeconds":"Lock duration in seconds. Must be 0, 30d, 180d, or 365d.","amount":"Staking tokens to deposit (must be pre-approved)."}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"unstake(uint256)":{"details":"Lock check: if lockEndTime[user] > block.timestamp \u2192 revert.         After unstake the user's position is fully cleared.","params":{"amount":"Staking tokens to withdraw."}}},"stateVariables":{"lockDuration":{"details":"Lock duration chosen by user at stake time (used for boost calc)."},"lockEndTime":{"details":"Timestamp when the user's lock expires (0 = no lock / flexible)."},"pendingRewards":{"details":"Accumulated rewards already earned but not yet claimed.      Snapshotted on re-stake so existing earnings are preserved."},"stakeTimestamp":{"details":"Timestamp when each user last staked (resets on re-stake)."},"stakedBalance":{"details":"Amount each user has staked."}},"title":"YieldFarming \u2014 Misty Farm \ud83c\udf3e","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"BOOST_NONE()":{"notice":"Boost multipliers (scaled \u00d7 10 to avoid decimals).         Actual multiplier = value / 10.         1.0\u00d7 = 10, 1.25\u00d7 = 12, 1.5\u00d7 = 15, 2.0\u00d7 = 20"},"LOCK_30_DAYS()":{"notice":"Lock durations for the boost tiers."},"PRECISION()":{"notice":"Scaling factor to keep reward math integer-safe (18 decimals)."},"calculateAPY()":{"notice":"Compute the current APY as an integer percentage."},"calculateReward(address)":{"notice":"Returns the total reward a user would receive if they claimed now.         Includes pending snapshot + newly accrued + boost multiplier."},"checkRewardSolvency(uint256)":{"notice":"Check whether the reward pool can cover all currently accruing         rewards for the next `windowSeconds` seconds."},"claimRewards()":{"notice":"Harvest all accumulated rewards without unstaking."},"emergencyWithdraw()":{"notice":"Exit immediately \u2014 forfeits ALL pending rewards."},"fundRewards(uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit reward tokens into the farming contract.         Must be called by owner before stakers can earn."},"getPosition(address)":{"notice":"Full position snapshot for a user."},"rewardRatePerSecond()":{"notice":"Reward tokens emitted per second PER staked token (scaled \u00d7 PRECISION).         Example: 1e16 = 0.01 reward tokens per staked token per second.         Owner can update this to adjust incentive intensity."},"rewardToken()":{"notice":"Token distributed as farming rewards (e.g. $WATERS or gov token)."},"setRewardRate(uint256)":{"notice":"Update the per-second reward emission rate.         Lower rate = lower APY, extends reward pool runway.         Higher rate = higher APY, burns through pool faster."},"stake(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit staking tokens and begin earning rewards."},"stakingToken()":{"notice":"Token users stake to earn rewards (e.g. MistySwap LP Token)."},"totalStaked()":{"notice":"Total staking tokens currently deposited across all users."},"unstake(uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw staked tokens after the lock expires.         Automatically claims all pending + accrued rewards first."}},"notice":"A time-based, per-second reward yield farming contract.         Users stake LP tokens and earn reward tokens continuously.         Implements boosted rewards for longer lock periods, emergency         withdrawal, and an on-chain APY view \u2014 the full DeFi calculateAPY().details: APY FORMULA:         yearlyEmission = rewardRatePerSecond × 365 days × totalStaked                         / PRECISION         APY (%) = yearlyEmission × 100 / totalStaked                 = rewardRatePerSecond × 365 days × 100 / PRECISION         This cancels totalStaked, so APY is independent of pool size         (true for per-token-per-second reward rates).  In practice,         as totalStaked grows, the effective APY per token stays         constant — the protocol emits MORE tokens total but each         staker's share is proportional.

returns.totalReward: Claimable reward amount (in reward token decimals).

returns.solvent: True if pool balance covers projected emissions.

claimRewards().details: REWARD CALCULATION ORDER:         1. base accrual since last stake/claim = _calculateBaseReward()         2. add frozen pendingRewards (from previous re-stakes)         3. apply boost multiplier for lock duration         4. reset pendingRewards and stakeTimestamp         SOLVENCY CHECK: reverts if the contract cannot pay the full         reward.  Owner must fund the reward pool proactively using         fundRewards().

params._owner: Owner — can update rate and fund rewards.
params._rewardRatePerSecond: Initial emission rate (scaled × PRECISION).                             Set to 1e16 for ~0.01 token/sec/token staked.
params._stakingToken: ERC-20 users deposit (e.g. MSLP from Day 25 AMM).

emergencyWithdraw().details: Use case: user needs liquidity urgently, or lock hasn't expired.         Forfeited rewards stay in the contract, growing the reward pool         for other stakers — a healthy incentive against panic exits.         NOTE: bypasses the lock check intentionally.         This is the "break glass" mechanism — always available.

params.amount: Reward tokens to add to the pool.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

stake(uint256,uint256).details: RE-STAKE LOGIC — if the user already has a position:         1. Snapshot their existing earned rewards into pendingRewards.         2. Add new tokens to stakedBalance.         3. Reset stakeTimestamp to now (fresh accrual window).         This preserves all previous earnings while avoiding double-         counting: the old balance's rewards up to now are frozen in         pendingRewards; only future accrual uses the new total balance.         LOCK DURATION — users choose flexibility or commitment:         • 0          → no lock, 1.0× rewards, unstake anytime         • 30 days    → soft lock, 1.25× boost         • 180 days   → medium lock, 1.5× boost         • 365 days   → full-year lock, 2.0× boost (Curve veCRV-style)

params._lockSeconds: Lock duration in seconds. Must be 0, 30d, 180d, or 365d.
params.amount: Staking tokens to deposit (must be pre-approved).

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

unstake(uint256).details: Lock check: if lockEndTime[user] > block.timestamp → revert.         After unstake the user's position is fully cleared.

BOOST_NONE().notice: Boost multipliers (scaled × 10 to avoid decimals).         Actual multiplier = value / 10.         1.0× = 10, 1.25× = 12, 1.5× = 15, 2.0× = 20

LOCK_30_DAYS().notice: Lock durations for the boost tiers.

PRECISION().notice: Scaling factor to keep reward math integer-safe (18 decimals).

calculateAPY().notice: Compute the current APY as an integer percentage.

calculateReward(address).notice: Returns the total reward a user would receive if they claimed now.         Includes pending snapshot + newly accrued + boost multiplier.

checkRewardSolvency(uint256).notice: Check whether the reward pool can cover all currently accruing         rewards for the next `windowSeconds` seconds.

claimRewards().notice: Harvest all accumulated rewards without unstaking.

emergencyWithdraw().notice: Exit immediately — forfeits ALL pending rewards.

fundRewards(uint256).notice: Deposit reward tokens into the farming contract.         Must be called by owner before stakers can earn.

getPosition(address).notice: Full position snapshot for a user.

rewardRatePerSecond().notice: Reward tokens emitted per second PER staked token (scaled × PRECISION).         Example: 1e16 = 0.01 reward tokens per staked token per second.         Owner can update this to adjust incentive intensity.

rewardToken().notice: Token distributed as farming rewards (e.g. $WATERS or gov token).

setRewardRate(uint256).notice: Update the per-second reward emission rate.         Lower rate = lower APY, extends reward pool runway.         Higher rate = higher APY, burns through pool faster.

stake(uint256,uint256).notice: Deposit staking tokens and begin earning rewards.

stakingToken().notice: Token users stake to earn rewards (e.g. MistySwap LP Token).

totalStaked().notice: Total staking tokens currently deposited across all users.

unstake(uint256).notice: Withdraw staked tokens after the lock expires.         Automatically claims all pending + accrued rewards first.
